source_schema: schemas/1dotRef1.json (used verbatim -- upstream already ships a compiled ShExJ schema, no ShExC translation needed)
comment: 1dotRef1_selfReference: <n1> in { <n1> <p1> <n1> . <n1> <p2> "X" } as <S1> in <S1> { <p1> @<S2> } <S2> { <p2> . } -- a shape reference where the referenced node is the SAME node as the referrer (self-reference); exercises the (focus,shape) cycle guard in validate_ref/validate_node without infinite-looping, since S1's <p1> value (n1) must itself conform to S2, and n1 does have <p2> "X".
